hackathon.name: Spark
hackathon.theme: Build Anything onchain that solves a personal problem
constraints: Project MUST be new: no code committed before 2026-07-13T13:00:00Z (auto-disqualify)
Must have an onchain component on Monad MAINNET or TESTNET
Contract address required (Monad mainnet or testnet)
Post URL required for 'Most viral' prize
anti_slop: No AI slop: unique identity, fits viewport, not obviously generated
No 'mystery box': README + demo video + setup instructions
No vaporware: real working feature, not hardcoded toasts

product.name: Glyph
product.tagline: Frictionless, push-based asset and authority delegation built natively for Monad
product.system_class: Decentralized Asset Vault & Ephemeral Authority Delegation Engine
product.problem: Web3 UX forces a paradox: Web2-like UX compromises self-custody. Burner wallets fragment capital/identity; giving agents raw keys risks total loss; public claim links are MEV-front-runnable.
product.solution: Glyph Vessel = a single signed entry point carrying a Value Payload (escrowed tokens, front-run-proof claim) and/or Authority Payload (EIP-7702 scoped session key with drawdown cap, target whitelist, time-bound expiry). Three configs: Value-Only, Authority-Only, Hybrid.
product.personal_angle: Solves the builder's own problem: distributing value via shareable links without MEV theft, and safely delegating execution to AI agents without exposing master keys.
product.category: Monad Testnet (upgrade to Mainnet if verified E2E)

frontend.stack: React + Tailwind + Viem + Framer Motion; Three.js (FloatingCore visualizer)

spec_notes.frontrun_defense: client-side ephemeral keypair from passcode; signature binds to msg.sender so copied mempool tx fails recovery
spec_notes.parallel_rules: vessels in mapping(bytes32=>Vessel); vesselId = keccak off-chain to avoid storage conflicts on Monad OCC

build_plan.priority_feature: Value-Only Glyph Link: create -> fund vault -> share link (passcode in URL hash) -> claimant claims with front-run-proof signature. Fully demonstrable E2E.
build_plan.phase_1: Foundry project: GlyphRegistry + IGlyphRegistry + GlyphSessionProxy, compile (evm-version prague), tests (front-run defense + session policy), forge test green
build_plan.phase_2: Deployment: generate deployer key, fund via faucet, deploy to Monad testnet, verify, record contract address
build_plan.phase_3: Frontend: VesselForge + FloatingCore + hooks + crypto.ts; connect to deployed contract; live create/claim flow
build_plan.phase_4: Polish + submission: README, demo video, social post, GitHub public, submit to Spark

context: Product concept LOCKED 2026-07-17: Glyph (value+authority delegation on Monad)
Local monskill only has router SKILL.md; sub-skills not installed -> use Monad docs directly for deploy
All committed code must be after 2026-07-13T13:00:00Z (first commit 2026-07-17, OK)
Tooling: git 2.43, node v22.22, npm 10.9.7 confirmed

checkpoints.done: Backend: Foundry project + GlyphRegistry + GlyphSessionProxy + IGlyphRegistry; forge build green (prague); 6 tests pass (front-run defense + session policy)
Frontend: Vite+React+TS app; VesselForge (escrow+share) + VesselClaim (front-run-proof claim); builds clean (761 modules); dev server serves 200
Deployed GlyphRegistry to Monad testnet 0xbD3Eef309bDF82479E089bF718b6E8C02DFd818C (9376 bytes code, verified on-chain)

resume: Read /root/monadglyph/MGlyph.session.json to restore context and continue.
